config.script_code:
def run():
    import imaplib, email, os
    from email.header import decode_header
    user = os.getenv('GMAIL_USER', '')
    pwd  = os.getenv('GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD', '')
    if not user or not pwd:
        return [{'from': 'alice@example.com', 'subject': 'Demande de devis', 'date': '2026-05-12', 'snippet': 'Bonjour, nous sommes interesses par vos services. Pourriez-vous nous envoyer un devis pour 10 licences ?'}, {'from': 'bob@example.com', 'subject': 'Question technique', 'date': '2026-05-12', 'snippet': 'Bonjour, comment puis-je integrer votre API dans mon projet Python ? Merci.'}]
    mail = imaplib.IMAP4_SSL('imap.gmail.com')
    mail.login(user, pwd)
    mail.select('INBOX')
    _, ids_data = mail.search(None, 'UNSEEN')
    ids = ids_data[0].split()[-10:]
    results = []
    for mid in ids:
        _, data = mail.fetch(mid, '(RFC822)')
        msg = email.message_from_bytes(data[0][1])
        raw_subj = decode_header(msg['Subject'] or '(sans sujet)')[0]
        subject = raw_subj[0].decode(raw_subj[1] or 'utf-8') if isinstance(raw_subj[0], bytes) else str(raw_subj[0])
        sender = msg['From'] or ''
        date   = msg['Date'] or ''
        snippet = ''
        if msg.is_multipart():
            for part in msg.walk():
                if part.get_content_type() == 'text/plain':
                    snippet = part.get_payload(decode=True).decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')[:300]
                    break
        else:
            payload = msg.get_payload(decode=True)
            snippet = payload.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')[:300] if payload else ''
        import re
        snippet = re.sub(r'\[image:[^\]]*\]', '', snippet).strip()
        results.append({'from': sender, 'subject': subject, 'date': date, 'snippet': snippet})
    mail.logout()
    return results

def run(llm, emails):
    import os
    from datetime import datetime
    os.makedirs('email_drafts', exist_ok=True)
    if not emails:
        return 'Aucun mail a traiter.'
    now = datetime.now()
    header_lines = [
        '=' * 60,
        '  BROUILLONS DE REPONSES',
        '  Genere le ' + now.strftime('%d/%m/%Y %H:%M'),
        '  Modifiez EN_ATTENTE -> APPROUVE pour envoyer',
        '=' * 60,
        '',
    ]
    draft_lines = []
    for i, m in enumerate(emails, 1):
        sender  = m.get('from', '')
        subject = m.get('subject', '(sans sujet)')
        snippet = m.get('snippet', '')
        reply_subject = subject if subject.lower().startswith('re:') else 'Re: ' + subject
        prompt = 'Redige une reponse professionnelle et concise a cet email.\n\nDE : ' + sender + '\nSUJET : ' + subject + '\nEXTRAIT : ' + snippet[:300] + '\n\nRedige uniquement le corps de la reponse, sans objet ni signature, en francais.'
        response = llm.invoke(prompt)
        body = response.content.strip() if hasattr(response, 'content') else str(response).strip()
        draft_lines += [
            '--- BROUILLON ' + str(i) + ' ---',
            'TO: ' + sender,
            'SUBJECT: ' + reply_subject,
            'STATUS: EN_ATTENTE',
            'BODY:',
            body,
            '',
        ]
    filename = 'email_drafts/brouillons_' + now.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S') + '.txt'
    content = '\n'.join(header_lines + draft_lines)
    with open(filename, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(content)
    return str(len(emails)) + ' brouillon(s) sauvegardes dans ' + filename + '\n\nOuvrez le fichier, changez EN_ATTENTE en APPROUVE pour les reponses a envoyer, puis lancez email_send.'
